SignIn.title: Sign in to Lemon Space
SignIn.description: Welcome back. Continue organizing your inspiration.
SignIn.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet. Please verify it first.
SignIn.verificationHint: Didn't receive the email? Resend to {email}

ForgotPassword.title: Recover password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we will send a secure password reset link.
ForgotPassword.emailHint: If this email is registered, you will receive a reset email.
ForgotPassword.sentToast: If this email exists, a reset email has been sent.
ForgotPassword.sentInline: Check the inbox for {email}, then open the link in the email to set a new password.

ResetPassword.title: Set new password
ResetPassword.description: Enter a new secure password. You can sign in again after saving it.
ResetPassword.invalidDescription: This link may have expired or already been used. Request a new password reset email.
ResetPassword.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

SignUp.title: Create your account
SignUp.description: Join Lemon Space and build your writing and visual inspiration system.
SignUp.checkInbox: Account created. Verification email sent to {email}

SignInPage.title: Continue your inspiration workflow
SignInPage.description: Sign in to sync collections, preferences and upload history.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Recover your Lemon Space account
ForgotPasswordPage.description: The reset link is only sent to your account email. For privacy, the page shows the same result whether the email exists or not.
ForgotPasswordPage.highlight3: Old sessions are revoked after reset

ResetPasswordPage.title: Choose a new secure password
ResetPasswordPage.description: After verifying through the email link, set a new password for your account.
ResetPasswordPage.highlight3: Return to sign in when done

SignUpPage.title: Create account, build your inspiration system
SignUpPage.description: Start from your first image and keep a structured visual library.

UploadPage.title: Upload your work
UploadPage.description: Batch upload with unified titles and tags to keep your assets searchable.
UploadPage.cardDescription: Do not upload prohibited content such as gore, sexual or violent material.
UploadPage.tip1: Use consistent tags in one batch for better filtering later.
UploadPage.tip2: Set a base title for batch uploads and let auto-numbering handle the rest.
UploadPage.tip3: Prefer clearer high-resolution images for better modal presentation.
UploadPage.formats: Supports JPG / PNG / WebP / AVIF / GIF

UploadArea.dragging: Drop files to add them to the upload queue
UploadArea.idle: Drag images here or click to select
